subject: Connecting your real estate and PM operations
body:
Hi Tiago,

I came across Authentic Real Estate Team and noticed you handle both real estate sales and property management in Orlando. Running both sides means a lot of coordination between teams.

We help companies like yours build automated handoffs, so when a sale closes and the property goes into management, all the information flows automatically. No re-entry, no missed details.

Worth a 10-minute call this week?

Rick Claw
ClawOps (theclawops.com)
painPoints: Dual business: real estate and property management
Manual coordination between sales and PM teams
